title: WinterTide
description:
A Magepunk-Themed Sandbox.

Supporting Fabric mods on top of Forge. 
Content packed with high-performance.

Created around physical, in-world mods with low-ui such as building magic rituals, mechanical machines and experimenting with physics mods.
body:
## Connect with our Community
Join us and our dedicated server at: **[https://discord.gg/662GjJwCua](https://discord.gg/662GjJwCua)**
_____________________________________

**Version: 1.20.1** 

WinterTide _- Based off of BonesMC._

## Welcome to WinterTide

Welcome to the dark-world of WinterTide. 

Vampires hunt you through this eternal night as it rages on, may you ever see the dawn.

Build fantastical magepunk contraptions, escape to the skies and practice fierce magic.

Embrace the dark arts and leave behind your fickle mortal coil and become one with the night.

![banner 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ySzimKdN/images/9e1d23e1064900312942fea69a39b70c62c3a945.png)
_____________________________________

## Made for Epic Wizard Duels.
Bewitchment and Valkyrien Skies let you throw lightning at your foes in style.

Nothing is more awesome than sitting on your steampunk airship while summoning arcane gods down on to your friends from the heavens.
_____________________________________

## Designed around Bewitchment together with Create and Valkyrien Skies.
An array of thematic mage-punk mods support a backbone of cutting edge physics!

Discover the secrets of dark arts, traverse dimensions and become the vampirian metaphysician you were destined to be.
_____________________________________

## Pushing Boundaries with Forge plus Fabric.
Created with physical, in-world mods with low-ui such as building magic rituals, mechanical machines and experimenting with physics mods.

Content packed with short load-times and high-performance optimisations.
____________________________________
![WinterTide Banner 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ySzimKdN/images/76c558af88e5c459834f750860add15bb96d57a8.png)

## Our Server
The Official WinterTide Server is fresh out of development! 

> This server is available by default in the modpack server list.
> 
> Just download the modpack and hit connect!

For more joining information, join the discord listed at the top of this page.
_____________________________________

## Future Expansions:
As players form opinions on the modpack we are able to regularly change mods in and out to try to find best combinations. 
> Since Forge 1.20.1 has been a focal point in the modding community, we will continue to add mods that fit in with create, bewitchment and valkyerian skies to make the most of what forge 1.20.1 has to offer. 

This pack is developed around physicalised mods with a tangible in-world presence which fit in with create, bewitchment and their mage-punk theme.

If you have any suggestions please let us know on our discord listed at the top of this page!
 _____________________________________

## List of Some Core Mods:
- **Airships:** Create: Clockwork, Create:Interactions, Valkyrien Skies
- **Magic:** Bewitchment, Ars Nouveau, Blood Magic, EvilCraft, Occultism, Eidolon, Mahou Tsukai, Vampirism, Werewolves
- **Traversal:** Immersive Aircraft, Mythic Mounts, Valkyrien Skies
- **Exploration:** DimDoors, Aether, Expanded Ecosphere, Antique Atlas
- **Create:** High Pressure, Armory, Interactive, More Automation, Destroy, Big Contraptions
______________________________________

**If any issues are experienced:**
- Please submit any bug or crash reports to me on Discord: @mr._bones
